headline: Martin Marietta Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
summary: RALEIGH, N.C., May 14, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The board of directors of Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) (“Martin Marietta” or the “Company”) today declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.83 per share on the Company’s outstanding common stock. This dividend will be payable on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on June 1, 2026. headline: Martin Marietta Materials (MLM): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Martin Marietta Materials currently trades at $585.98 per share and has shown little upside over the past six months, posting a small loss of 4.7%. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 7.9% gain during that period.
